sections.title: MM2H and property

sections.title: Johor project links
paragraphs: Forest City suits lifestyle and golf-oriented holders; R&F targets CIQ proximity; Danga Bay offers mature rental markets at lower entry points.

faq.q: Are you a licensed MM2H agent?
faq.a: No. We refer immigration matters to licensed professionals and focus on property landing.
